<span class='huge'>Conference papers</span><br>

<span class='bigger'>2019</span><br>

<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; RP-DNN: a tweet-level propagation context based deep neural networks for<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; early rumour detection in social media</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Jie Gao, <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Xingy Song, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC)<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2002.12683.pdf"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a> &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/RPDNN"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Neural language model based training data augmentation for weakly supervised<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; early rumour detection</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Advances in Social Networks Analysis and Mining (ASONAM)<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/1907.07033.pdf"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Data augmentation for rumour detection using context-sensitive neural language<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; model with large-scale credibility corpus</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) workshop on Learning<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; from Limited Labeled Data (LLD) <br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://openreview.net/pdf?id=SyxCysRNdV"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Rumour detection on social media for crisis management</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span> and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Information Systems for Crisis Response and Management (ISCRAM)<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://pdfs.semanticscholar.org/8298/9a83f48551fc87734e2a2cdac69dbd312d24.pdf"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>


<br>
<span class='huge'>Ph.D. thesis</span><br>

<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Context-aware message-level rumour detection with weak supervision</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The University of Sheffield<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="http://etheses.whiterose.ac.uk/27302/1/shan_finalcopy.pdf"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
